name_en: 🆕 N00092 Blue! MULTIPLE Short wallet Multiple wallet crafted with Monogram canvas and Taïga leather to create a tonal effect, outlining simple lines. It contains multiple compartments and card slots to hold bank cards, receipts, and paper money, and can be easily placed in most pockets. Dimensions:12/9cm.
